title: neogaerrhinum filipes
intro: Neogaerrhinum filipes, also known as the lesser geranium, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Neogaerrhinum filipes include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
